default_body.markdown:
## FuryMC Launcher v0.1.1 Release

This is the first proper release of FuryMC Launcher.

### Changes:
- Synced with Zalith Launcher 2 v2.4.4 core.
- Re-added Offline Login capabilities.
- Refined About screen with Discord links.
- Purged sensitive data and fixed CurseForge API integration.
- Fixed repository history issue.

### 🤖 AI Assistance
This project is developed and maintained with AI assistance. We apologize for any previous mistakes.
